'''Vekki''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] in the [[Bantha Clan]] at the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Adademy]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], she (along with the rest of the Academy's students) was marched out to the Academy's courtyard by [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] troops under the command of [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Salle Serpa]]. When, at [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo's]] signal, the students struck back against the GAG troops, Serpa used Vekki as a shield, threatening the young girl's life as he attempted to make his escape. She was rescued by the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Zekk]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1st}}
